catalogTableInfo.definition-query:
SELECT `tmp`.`user_id`, `tmp`.`ds`, SUM(`tmp`.`payment_amount_cents`) AS `payed_buy_fee_sum`, SUM(1) AS `PV`, AVG(`tmp`.`payment_amount_cents`) AS `avg_payment`
FROM (SELECT `json_source`.`user_id`, `json_source`.`order_created_at` AS `ds`, `json_source`.`payment_amount_cents`
FROM `mt_cat`.`mydb`.`json_source` AS `json_source`) AS `tmp`
GROUP BY `tmp`.`user_id`, `tmp`.`ds`
catalogTableInfo.schema.2.name: payed_buy_fee_sum
catalogTableInfo.schema.1.name: ds
catalogTableInfo.schema.4.name: avg_payment
catalogTableInfo.partition.keys.0.name: ds
catalogTableInfo.schema.3.name: PV
catalogTableInfo.schema.0.name: user_id
